options.name: Compact
options.description: A tightly-knit hunter group with no supernatural powers.
options.hint: No Endowments — rely on skill and preparation

options.name: Conspiracy
options.description: A large organization with access to supernatural Endowments.
options.hint: Grants Endowments specific to your organization

options.name: Ashwood Abbey
options.description: Thrill-seeking aristocrats who hunt for sport.

options.name: The Long Night
options.description: Evangelical Christians preparing for the Apocalypse.

options.name: Null Mysteriis
options.description: Scientists studying the supernatural as phenomenon.

options.name: Network Zero
options.description: Media-savvy hunters who expose the supernatural online.

options.name: Cheiron Group
options.description: A megacorp that harvests supernatural traits.

options.name: Lucifuge
options.description: Hunters who claim demonic descent — fight fire with fire.

options.name: Aegis Kai Doru
options.description: Greek artifact-hunters who wield supernatural relics.

options.name: Ascending Ones
options.description: Alchemists who use elixirs to fight the supernatural.

options.name: Task Force: VALKYRIE
options.description: A classified U.S. government agency with experimental anti-supernatural weaponry.

powers.label: Endowments
powers.description: Conspiracy members receive 3 dots of Endowments from their organization. Compact members have no Endowments. Refer to Hunter: the Vigil for your organization's specific Endowment list.

items.name: Etheric Rounds
items.description: Ammunition that damages incorporeal entities and Twilight beings. Renewable: regain 1 clip per dot per session.

items.name: Witch Buster
items.description: Passive device that detects and tags psychics and witches in the area.

items.name: Etheric Goggles
items.description: See entities in Twilight with −2 Perception penalty; includes night vision. •••• version also tracks etheric traces.

items.name: The Bleeder
items.description: Ranged device that drains blood and Willpower from hemovores (vampires).

items.name: Equalizer Grenade
items.description: Prevents shapeshifting for 5 turns on a successful throw. Renewable each session.

items.name: Gungnir System
items.description: Smart scope for SMG or assault rifle with target ID, night vision, thermal, and Kirlian imaging.

items.name: VDSB
items.description: Sunlight flash grenade that panics vampires and inflicts fire damage.

items.name: Etheric Tracker
items.description: Fires tracking pellets visible through Twilight; tracks quarry for up to 24 hours.

items.name: Munin Serum
items.description: Memory-suppression drug. Renewable: 1 syringe per dot per session.

items.name: Mjolnir Cannon
items.description: Plasma weapon dealing 6 bashing (wide beam) or 4 lethal (focused). ••••• version increases damage.

items.name: The Apostle's Teachings
items.description: Share Willpower gained from Virtue fulfillment with all allies within sight.

items.name: Armor of St. Martin
items.description: Grants Armor equal to Benediction dots for one scene. Does not stack with mundane or supernatural armor.

items.name: Epipodian Safeguard
items.description: Adds Benediction rating to Resistance against supernatural mental domination and control for one scene.

items.name: Blessed Protection of St. Agrippina
items.description: Create a blessed ward that weakens supernatural creatures entering the area. Lasts one day (general) or one week (vs. specific creature).

items.name: The Boon of Lazarus
items.description: Touch a recently dead ally (dead no longer than Benediction minutes) and resurrect them. The restored character automatically gains a major derangement.

items.name: Fortitude of St. George
items.description: Gain a dot of Stamina for one scene and go without food or sleep for Benediction days. Cannot be used more than once per 24 hours.

items.name: The Hands of St. Luke
items.description: Heal an ally's wounds by laying on hands: 1 success heals bashing, 2 successes heal lethal. Cannot heal yourself; maximum rolls equal Morality.

items.name: Sanctification of the Blessed Virgin
items.description: Create a blessed item. Each dot of rating requires 3 successes; maximum rating is capped by the hunter's Morality. Spend an extra Willpower to make it permanent.

items.name: The Shepherd's Blessing
items.description: Become effectively invisible to ordinary mortals for one scene as long as you take no overtly hostile actions or speak loudly.

items.name: True Sight of St. Abel
items.description: Pierce supernatural masking (vampiric Masquerade, werewolf Lunacy, mage Quiescence). All blessed see monsters truly for the rest of the scene.

items.name: Vade Retro Satana
items.description: Add Benediction rating as a bonus to abjuration and exorcism dice pools. Serves simultaneously as both an abjuration and an exorcism rite.

items.name: Wrathful Sword of St. Michael
items.description: Imbue a melee weapon with aggravated damage against supernatural creatures. It shatters once it has inflicted successes in aggravated damage equal to the successes rolled.

items.name: Calling Forth the Pit
items.description: Summon a random demon or a specific named entity, or banish one. Summoning takes 10 successes; banishment is contested and extended. Named demon grants a +2 bonus.

items.name: Familiar
items.description: Bind a minor demon as a Twilight or embodied familiar. It obeys your commands, but its loyalty is rarely unconditional.

items.name: Gaze of the Penitent
items.description: Wrack the target with guilt and visions of hellish torment. Penalty to all dice pools equal to (10 − Morality) for a number of turns equal to successes rolled.

items.name: Hellfire
items.description: Conjure hellish fire at a target for 1 lethal damage. Spend 1 Willpower and suffer 1 aggravated damage yourself to inflict aggravated damage on the target instead.

items.name: Infernal Visions
items.description: Once per session, gain a supernatural prophetic insight into a question or topic. Clues are symbolic and must be interpreted. Prevents Willpower recovery the next night's rest.

items.name: Mandate of Hell
items.description: Compel a demon to obey a simple one-word command (contested, no cost) or a complex multi-step order (extended, costs 1 Willpower, 3 successes per step of the command).

items.name: Sense of the Unrighteous
items.description: Meditate to sense sin in nearby creatures and locations within 2 yards per success. An exceptional success reveals the general nature of a lingering past sin.

items.name: Shackles of Pandemonium
items.description: Trap a demon within a ritual circle drawn with your blood. The circle may be laid in advance as a trap. The demon cannot leave until the stated release condition is met.

items.name: Tongue of Babel
items.description: Passive: speak and understand every human language. This applies only to spoken words; it does not allow reading foreign text or translating mystical or spirit languages.

items.name: Crocodile Tears
items.description: Feign mortal illness to appear near death and lure opponents into underestimating you. Failure is like a mild marijuana dose; dramatic failure is a Toxicity 2 poison.

items.name: Eye of Ra
items.description: Anoint your eyes with sacred oil to gain a Perception bonus equal to your Elixir rating for the scene. Exceptional success: may reflexively detect supernatural creatures.

items.name: Breath of Ma'at
items.description: Fast and meditate to seek absolution for a recent moral failure, re-rolling a degeneration check that caused a Morality loss. May only be used once per story.

items.name: Elixir of the Fiery Heart
items.description: Steel yourself against supernatural and mundane fear for the scene. Subtract your Elixir rating from any dice pool attempting to frighten you. Exceptional: immune to non-supernatural fear.

items.name: Bennu-Bird Feather
items.description: Apply this thick paste to wounds to accelerate healing. Each success heals 2 bashing or 1 lethal damage. Exceptional: double the healing rate for the rest of the scene.

items.name: A Glimpse of After
items.description: A vision of paradise drives away pain. Ignore all wound penalties for the scene and stay conscious even if the last Health box fills with bashing damage. Exceptional: half damage from bashing attacks.

items.name: Mind-Talking Drug
items.description: Inject this psychotropic to read surface thoughts and project your own into nearby minds within line of sight. Two-way mental conversation requires a Presence + Composure roll per turn.

items.name: Breath of the Dragon
items.description: Exhale a cloud of Toxicity 4 lethal poison affecting one target in close combat range. Exceptional success: add your Elixir rating to the cloud's Toxicity.

items.name: Amun's Water
items.description: Drink this deep-blue potion to become completely invisible for one scene — literal invisibility, not a psychic trick. Any hostile action immediately breaks the effect.

items.name: Incense of the Next World
items.description: Breathe this musky incense to astrally project into Twilight, leaving your body behind. The process requires 10 successes (each roll represents 10 minutes of breathing).

items.name: Blood of the Cobra
items.description: Inject this cobra-venom compound to gain +1 Strength and +1 Dexterity per success rolled. Your blood becomes lethal poison to any creature that feeds on it for 24 hours.

items.name: Mesmeric Vapors
items.description: Exhale a cloud of golden smoke to reduce a target to a hypnotic, deeply suggestible state for 10 minutes. Complex instructions take 1 minute per step of the command to program in.

items.name: One-Eyed Kings
items.description: A pair of ancient copper coins. Press the left-eye coin to your eye to see through the right-eye coin's location (one-way remote vision). Using it in reverse shows a glimpse of the void, costing 1 WP and risking a derangement.

items.name: Skeleton Key
items.description: A silver key that fits any lock. Opens magically sealed and warded doors (contested vs. ward successes). The door automatically re-locks when the key is removed.

items.name: Blood of Pope Joan
items.description: Holy blood that functions as a level-1 blessed item. Werewolves suffer −2 to all rolls against a hunter carrying this Relic.

items.name: Eye of Hubris
items.description: A quartz crystal that causes magical misfires. Any monster using an obviously supernatural power in the same room suffers −2 to its activation roll. Lasts one scene.

items.name: Icarine Servitor
items.description: A wax doll that animates at dawn or dusk into a tiny living spy. It recognizes designated targets, can slip poison into drinks, and remains active until the next dawn or dusk. Extremely vulnerable to fire.

items.name: Ringsel
items.description: A sacred Buddhist stone. In meditation, spend Willpower to heal: 1 WP heals 1 bashing, 2 WP heals 1 lethal. Once per day. Also absorbs one degeneration per session, negating the roll entirely.

items.name: Watchful Keris
items.description: A wavy-bladed dagger granting +1 Initiative. Even when surprised, you may act in the first turn of combat — but the action must be an attack with the Keris itself.

items.name: Heart of Stone
items.description: A glassy rock that, when electrified, draws growing covetousness toward whatever it's hooked to. By day 7, monstrous creatures (erinyes) begin arriving. Inflicts a Fixation derangement on the owner while active.

items.name: Witch-Candle
items.description: A pewter candlestick. When a witch casts a spell within its light, gargoyle carvings animate — 1 per success, up to 4 max. They attack the spellcaster for a number of turns equal to the successes rolled.

items.name: Aegis Talisman
items.description: A silver amulet providing 3 points of Armor against all damage sources (doesn't stack). Spend 1 WP to brandish it: the loser of the contested roll is paralyzed with fear for the margin of successes in turns.

items.name: Dead Man's Face
items.description: A mask of cured human skin. Place it on a corpse dead no more than 12 hours; roll 1 success per hour dead. The corpse briefly reanimates and can answer roughly one question per Stamina minute.

items.name: Doru Talisman
items.description: A miniature silver spear that functions as a 3(L) melee weapon, capable of striking targets up to 10 yards away. The wielder mimes a thrust; wounds appear on the target as if struck by an actual spear.

items.name: Anger Patch
items.description: A patch of vampire skin grafted to the neck. Instinctively detects vampires on sight (triggers once per vampire). The hunter suffers −1 on Social rolls against vampires.

items.name: Weapon of Last Resort
items.description: Implanted razor claws or fangs. Brawl attacks inflict lethal damage. At •• (2 dots): also gain a bite attack inflicting 1(L); a successful grapple is required first for the bite.

items.name: Devil's Eyes
items.description: Demonic eye transplants that perceive emotional auras. Each success reveals one aura color for a character in line of sight. Exceptional success: read the auras of all characters in LoS simultaneously.

items.name: Lover's Lips
items.description: Vampire-blood sacs implanted in the jaw. Anyone who tastes the secreted blood (typically through a kiss) experiences morphine-like euphoria and gains 9-again on Social rolls vs. the hunter for the next scene.

items.name: Personal Defense Swarm
items.description: Wrist-implanted insect creatures that hatch from a valve when activated by a syringe. The 4-yard swarm attacks whoever provokes the hunter's anger for 10 turns. Cheiron provides 25 activations per resupply.

items.name: Quick-Step
items.description: Ligament implants from swift supernatural creatures. Grants +3 Speed and 9-again on foot-chase Athletics rolls. Running double Speed in a turn lets you retain Defense against Firearms attacks.

items.name: Twitcher
items.description: A spinal implant using the higher of Wits or Dexterity for Defense. When surprised or attacked unseen, use the lower of the two (instead of losing Defense entirely). Side effects: nightly nightmare rolls; surprise combat triggers a Morality check.

items.name: Regenerative Nodule
items.description: A werewolf-tissue nodule in the gut lining. Once activated, heals 1 bashing per turn and 1 lethal per 15 minutes until all bashing and lethal wounds close. One-week cooldown after use. No effect on aggravated damage.

items.name: Banality Worm
items.description: A nihilism-creature implanted near the heart. Any supernatural effect targeting the host subtracts the host's Resolve from its activation dice pool (double Resolve if the power already requires a Resolve resistance). Also: −1 die on degeneration checks.

items.name: Hand of Glory
items.description: A transplanted corpse-hand whose lit fingers mesmerize observers. Anyone in line of sight who loses the contested roll is frozen in place. The hunter may move and act freely while the flames remain visible to the victim.

powers.compactNote: Compact hunters have no Endowments. Your strength is skill, preparation, and numbers.
